description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 99.

Tier III: Shadowblade

Prerequisite: Shroud of Night

Death From Nowhere. When you hit a creature that cannot see you with a melee weapon attack, you can cause the attack to deal double damage. You can use this feature once per turn.

Phantom Dodge. You do not cast a shadow or a reflection unless you choose to do so. As a reaction when you are hit by an attack or damaged by an effect, you can collapse into shadow entirely, causing the attack to miss or the damage to be avoided and teleporting you up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is in dim light or darkness. If there are no eligible spaces to teleport to, you cannot use this reaction.

Path Connections Legendary Sniper. Instead of the Death Mark Heroic Perk, you can take the Hunter’s Eye Perk, changing to the Legendary Sniper path.

Warlord. Instead of the Death Mark Heroic Perk, you can take the Defensive Proficiency Perk, changing to the Warlord path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
